domains_hint: Extra names your apps answer on, on top of your main domain. Adding or removing one restarts every running app.
unlisted_store: This app comes from a store you have not added:
unlisted_store_hint: Only install it if you trust that source.
restore_from_backup_hint: Reinstalls the app on top of that backup's data and .env.
app_env_hint: The variables CasaDash passes into every app it installs — the domain, the network, the identity apps are seeded with. The comments in the file explain each one. An empty value means "not set": the key is skipped rather than passed on blank.
app_env_owner: This file belongs to the deployment, not to CasaDash. On a Yundera PCS the orchestrator writes it and may overwrite your changes.
app_env_applies: Saved changes reach each app the next time it starts. Nothing is restarted here.
app_env_ignored: CasaDash sets these itself, per app — the values here have no effect:
